commands.review_summary:
The PR updates QMD Windows `.cmd` shim/package fallback resolution, adds guarded URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image response parsing plus SDK docs/export, and currently changes the root dependency graph and two instruction-file symlink modes.

PR surface: Source +242, Tests +350, Docs 0, Config +1, Generated 0, Other +724. Total +1317 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still uses the unscoped QMD fallback and parses only `b64_json`, while the PR body supplies Windows and image-generation after-fix proof. I did not execute the Windows or provider flow locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is opted into automerge and has narrow mechanical blockers that an automated repair can attempt without deciding the broader product direction.
